import Mathlib

universe u

open CategoryTheory Opposite AlgebraicGeometry

namespace AlgebraicGeometry

section T

variable {A B : CommRingCat.{u}} (φ : A ⟶ B)

example (N : (Spec B).Modules) :
    N.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_top :
      (⊤ : (Spec B).Opens) ≤ Spec.map φ ⁻¹ᵁ ⊤)).op = 𝟙 _ := by
  rw [show (homOfLE (le_top : (⊤ : (Spec B).Opens) ≤ Spec.map φ ⁻¹ᵁ ⊤)) = 𝟙 ⊤ from rfl,
    op_id, N.presheaf.map_id]

private lemma test2 (N : (Spec B).Modules) :
    N.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_top :
      (⊤ : (Spec B).Opens) ≤ Spec.map φ ⁻¹ᵁ ⊤)).op = 𝟙 _ := by
  rw [show (homOfLE (le_top : (⊤ : (Spec B).Opens) ≤ Spec.map φ ⁻¹ᵁ ⊤)) = 𝟙 ⊤ from rfl,
    op_id, N.presheaf.map_id]

end T

end AlgebraicGeometry
